waves.name: Pre-launch ops gate
waves.exit_criteria: ABC enrollment complete (Apple-side weeks) + Sentry on-call wiring + launch-day runbook + first-org staging walk + ses-proxy Lambda deployed + BLAST_RECEIPTS_SECRET synced + FEATURES.CONGRESSIONAL=true PR merged

waves.name: First-org launch + substrate cleanup
waves.exit_criteria: First org runs first verified campaign through the platform; substrate writer wire-ups (TR-E) complete so reputationTier promotion, atlasVersion drift surfacing, debate field population, and brandingAccent UI all work as advertised

waves.name: Post-launch hardening
waves.exit_criteria: TEE Nitro Enclave deployed + delegation executor running; mainnet contracts deployed (Safe multisig + audit complete); receipt Merkle anchoring pipeline live; audit log + observability digests wired

waves.name: Phase 2 precision + platform partnerships
waves.exit_criteria: ACS + density-aware K-anonymity layer; SLDU/SLDL coverage; multi-state G3 measurement; Postal Bubble disambiguation UX; AN OSDI sync live; OSDI namespace shipped; SDK publish pipelines running; developer portal up

waves.name: International expansion
waves.exit_criteria: CA/GB/AU rep-lookup live; cross-border schema; multi-country coalition delivery; TIGER 2026 monitoring + DOGE resilience playbook
